title: Uttam Nagar Holi murder: MCD tells Delhi HC that houses of accused on encroached public street, no notice needed before demolition
description: The Delhi High Court on Wednesday orally asked the Municipal Corporation of Delhi (MCD) not to undertake any demolition against the homes of persons accused of the murder of a 26-year-old in Uttam Nagar during Holi celebrations.Justice Amit Bansal also directed the petitioners to withdraw the current petition and file a fresh petition confining themselves to demolition action by MCD without delving into the police probe in the murder case."It is pointed out that averments in the petition are vag
